basic_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dp.degree_program_id) AS degree_count FROM Departments AS d JOIN Degree_Programs AS dp ON d.department_id = dp.department_id WHERE d.department_name = 'Engineering'
robust_sql: WITH filtered AS (SELECT dp.degree_program_id FROM Departments AS d JOIN Degree_Programs AS dp ON d.department_id = dp.department_id WHERE d.department_name = 'Engineering') SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT degree_program_id) AS degree_count FROM filtered

basic_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ml.ModelId) FROM car_makers AS cm JOIN model_list AS ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker WHERE cm.FullName = 'American Motor Company'
robust_sql: WITH filtered AS (SELECT DISTINCT ml.ModelId FROM car_makers AS cm JOIN model_list AS ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker WHERE cm.FullName = 'American Motor Company') SELECT COUNT(*) AS model_count FROM filtered

basic_sql: SELECT c.Continent, COUNT(cm.Id) AS CarMakerCount FROM car_makers AS cm JOIN countries AS c ON cm.Country = c.CountryId GROUP BY c.Continent
robust_sql: WITH deduplicated_countries AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CountryId ORDER BY rowid DESC) AS rn FROM countries), joined_data AS (SELECT cm.Id, cm.Maker, cm.FullName, cm.Country, d.Continent FROM car_makers AS cm JOIN deduplicated_countries AS d ON cm.Country = d.CountryId) SELECT d.Continent, COUNT(joined_data.Id) AS CarMakerCount FROM joined_data GROUP BY d.Continent

basic_sql: SELECT d.department_name, d.department_id, COUNT(dp.degree_program_id) AS degree_count FROM Departments AS d JOIN Degree_Programs AS dp ON d.department_id = dp.department_id GROUP BY d.department_id ORDER BY degree_count DESC LIMIT 1
robust_sql: WITH base AS (SELECT d.department_name, d.department_id, dp.degree_program_id FROM Departments AS d JOIN Degree_Programs AS dp ON d.department_id = dp.department_id), dedup AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department_id ORDER BY rowid DESC) AS rn FROM base) SELECT department_name, department_id, COUNT(degree_program_id) AS degree_count FROM dedup WHERE rn = 1 GROUP BY department_id ORDER BY degree_count DESC LIMIT 1

basic_sql: SELECT transcript_date, transcript_id FROM Transcripts GROUP BY transcript_date, transcript_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1
robust_sql: WITH base AS (SELECT * FROM Transcripts), dedup AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY transcript_id ORDER BY rowid DESC) AS rn FROM base) SELECT transcript_date, transcript_id FROM dedup WHERE rn = 1 GROUP BY transcript_date, transcript_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1

basic_sql: SELECT T2.Model FROM cars_data AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.Maker = T2.Maker WHERE T1.Weight < (SELECT AVG(Weight) FROM cars_data)
robust_sql: WITH avg_weight AS (SELECT AVG(Weight) AS avg_weight_val FROM cars_data), filtered_cars AS (SELECT T2.Model FROM cars_data AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.Maker = T2.Maker WHERE T1.Weight < (SELECT avg_weight_val FROM avg_weight)), deduplicated_models AS (SELECT DISTINCT Model FROM filtered_cars) SELECT * FROM deduplicated_models

basic_sql: SELECT cm.Maker, cm.MakerId, cm.FullName, COUNT(ml.ModelId) AS model_count FROM car_makers AS cm JOIN model_list AS ml ON cm.Maker = ml.Maker GROUP BY cm.Maker, cm.MakerId, cm.FullName
robust_sql: WITH cm_dedup AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Id ORDER BY rowid DESC) AS rn FROM car_makers), ml_dedup AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ModelId ORDER BY rowid DESC) AS rn FROM model_list) SELECT cm_dedup.Maker, cm_dedup.MakerId, cm_dedup.FullName, COUNT(ml_dedup.ModelId) AS model_count FROM cm_dedup JOIN ml_dedup ON cm_dedup.Maker = ml_dedup.Maker WHERE cm_dedup.rn = 1 AND ml_dedup.rn = 1 GROUP BY cm_dedup.Maker, cm_dedup.MakerId, cm_dedup.FullName

basic_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s.first_name, s.middle_name, s.last_name FROM Students AS s JOIN Student_Enrolment AS se ON s.student_id = se.student_id JOIN Degree_Programs AS dp ON se.degree_program_id = dp.degree_program_id WHERE dp.degree_summary_name = 'Bachelors'
robust_sql: WITH base AS (SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.middle_name, s.last_name FROM Students AS s JOIN Student_Enrolment AS se ON s.student_id = se.student_id JOIN Degree_Programs AS dp ON se.degree_program_id = dp.degree_program_id WHERE dp.degree_summary_name = 'Bachelors'), dedup AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY student_id ORDER BY rowid DESC) AS rn FROM base) SELECT first_name, middle_name, last_name FROM dedup WHERE rn = 1

basic_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cars_data WHERE Accelerate > (SELECT MAX(Horsepower) FROM cars_data)
robust_sql: WITH max_horsepower AS (SELECT MAX(Horsepower) AS max_hp FROM cars_data), filtered_cars AS (SELECT * FROM cars_data WHERE Accelerate > (SELECT max_hp FROM max_horsepower)) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM filtered_cars

basic_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Maker) AS maker_count FROM car_makers AS cm JOIN countries AS c ON cm.Country = c.CountryId WHERE c.Continent = 'Europe' AND c.CountryName = 'France'
robust_sql: WITH filtered AS (SELECT DISTINCT Maker FROM car_makers AS cm JOIN countries AS c ON cm.Country = c.CountryId WHERE c.Continent = 'Europe' AND c.CountryName = 'France') SELECT COUNT(*) AS maker_count FROM filtered

basic_sql: SELECT Model, COUNT(DISTINCT Version) AS version_count FROM car_names GROUP BY Model ORDER BY version_count DESC LIMIT 1
robust_sql: WITH dedup AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Model ORDER BY rowid DESC) AS rn FROM car_names) SELECT Model, COUNT(DISTINCT Version) AS version_count FROM dedup WHERE rn = 1 GROUP BY Model ORDER BY version_count DESC LIMIT 1
